title: Smaller Fire
description: Make fire smaller, either if your mining or you hate how fire fills up your entire screen!
body:
# Welcome to Smaller Fire!
Smaller Fire allows you to see netherrite while mining, and decrease the size of fire while its burning on you so it doesnt take up your full screen.

### Smaller Fire will STOP the animation, it will not make your minecraft fire look good!
I advise turning it on with fire resistance or mining for netherrite.
